name: HRP (Ward)
description: Hierarchical Risk Parity across all 13 assets: global equities (VUSA, EQQQ, AIGC, IIND, IMEU, IWRD), precious metals (SSLN, SGLN), commodities (COMM, BRNT, CRUD, WCOA), and bonds (VUTY). Ward linkage minimises variance within clusters, creating balanced and stable cluster structures that capture the natural asset-class hierarchy.
